case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. EDWARD WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED JUL-11-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
